text_original: What happened to being able to change the chat style? That was one of the things that I loved about this app. I've been using it for years now and just upgraded to a lifetime pro membership last Christmas. Everything is getting better, but taking that away was a big downgrade.
text_zh: 现在还能不能更改聊天风格了？这是我最喜欢的功能之一。我已经用了好几年，去年圣诞节刚升级成了终身专业会员。虽然整体在变好，但取消这个功能确实是个大退步。
reply_original: Hi there, we completely understand your concern about the chat style adjustment. This feature is still available under the Pro membership. Could you please check your settings or share a screenshot of the issue? For further assistance, kindly contact support@fantachat.ai. We value your feedback and are here to help!
reply_zh: 你好，我们完全理解您对聊天风格调整功能的担忧。此功能仍可在Pro会员中使用。请您检查设置或分享问题的截图？如需进一步帮助，请联系support@fantachat.ai。我们重视您的反馈，并随时为您提供帮助！
